candidate_a.title: Hyper-local Seasonal Gleaner App
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty sourcing surplus fresh, unrefined local produce for complex meals
candidate_a.core_concept: Direct trade of backyard fruit/vegetable surplus with local households
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Develop a geolocated map-based exchange that matches excess home-grown supply with localized kitchen demand
candidate_a.prototype_scope: One neighborhood Slack/Telegram integration managing peer-to-peer pick-ups of three specified seasonal food items

candidate_b.title: Hyper-local Seasonal Gleaner App
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty sourcing surplus fresh, unrefined local produce for complex meals
candidate_b.core_concept: Peer-to-peer exchange of surplus backyard produce.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A manual, community-moderated bulletin board for neighborhood produce sharing.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A dedicated WhatsApp group for one street to post photos of surplus items for free pickup. | Identify 10 households with gardens; Create WhatsApp group; Facilitate 5 successful exchanges; Document pickup friction points

candidate_a.title: Pantry Potioneer
candidate_a.target_user: Home cooks trying to minimize food waste
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Managing quickly expiring ingredients that end up in the trash
candidate_a.core_concept: An RPG fantasy loop where monsters representing hunger levels and potion recipes are dynamically generated based on manual pantry inventory scanning.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Camera-vision OCR scanning that maps specific pantry items to equipment traits (e.g., milk is defensive, spice is offensive) to fend off pantry chaos creatures.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Inventory scanner integration processing ten basic produce items as offensive ability slots.

candidate_b.title: Pantry Potioneer
candidate_b.target_user: Home cooks trying to minimize food waste
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Managing quickly expiring ingredients that end up in the trash
candidate_b.core_concept: RPG fantasy loop where inventory management is tied to real-world pantry items.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: An RPG where players manually input their pantry items to gain equipment traits for a fantasy battle.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: An inventory screen where users select from ten basic produce items to assign offensive ability slots. | Design ten produce items and their traits; Implement manual inventory selection UI; Build simple battle loop

candidate_a.title: Syntax Storm
candidate_a.target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
candidate_a.core_concept: Combat strategy built on cleaning buggy code snippets.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A puzzle game where players fix buggy code snippets to defeat enemies in a grid-based combat system.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments. | Design two buggy code snippets; Implement basic grid combat logic; Build simple UI for code repair

candidate_b.title: Syntax Storm
candidate_b.target_user: Developers working on clean code focus
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: High mental fatigue during weekend learning periods
candidate_b.core_concept: Combat strategy built entirely on cleaning buggy snippets, represented as infected territory grids.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Applying real regex principles as combat commands, effectively treating syntax repair as real-time defensive fortification building.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: One combat grid that rewards valid syntax string repair of two predefined erroneous input segments.

candidate_a.title: Institutional Waste Conversion Catering
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Requirement to serve ethical, low-impact high-quality group catering
candidate_a.core_concept: Catering using 'ugly' or near-expiry bulk ingredients.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A boutique catering service sourcing ingredients from local produce markets' end-of-day surplus.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Prepare and serve 5 lunches using ingredients purchased at a discount from a local market at closing time. | Identify local market surplus schedule; Design menu based on available 'ugly' produce; Execute 5 lunch deliveries; Survey recipients on quality perception

candidate_b.title: Institutional Waste Conversion Catering
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Requirement to serve ethical, low-impact high-quality group catering
candidate_b.core_concept: Meals prepared exclusively from 'ugly' or near-expiry restaurant bulk raw materials
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Maintain partnerships with high-end food distributors to repurpose unpicked perfectly edible industrial excess
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Catering 5 lunches for one specific office office environment focusing on total reduction of carbon-spend data collection

candidate_a.title: KitchenCodex
candidate_a.target_user: Home hobby cooks attempting complex international cuisine
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Information silos occurring during parallel recipe preparations across multi-ingredient workflows
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Instead of procedural text recipe formats, render active time steps chronologically per critical ingredient node
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Horizontal scrolling chart mapping preparation stages from prep work to cook time by category

candidate_b.title: KitchenCodex
candidate_b.target_user: Home hobby cooks attempting complex international cuisine
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Information silos occurring during parallel recipe preparations across multi-ingredient workflows
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A recipe viewer that allows users to toggle between procedural and ingredient-based views.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A web page with a simple timeline visualization for one recipe. | Choose one complex recipe; Build a timeline visualization; Test with a user
